sentences.arabic: نَظَّمَ نَادِي الشَّبَابِ مَسَابَقَةً فِي السِّبَاحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Omladinski klub organizovao je takmičenje u plivanju.
sentences.translationEn: The youth club organized a swimming competition.

sentences.arabic: شَارَكَ فِيهَا أَكْثَرُ مِنْ عِشْرِينَ طِفْلًا.
sentences.translation: Učestvovalo je više od dvadeset djece.
sentences.translationEn: More than twenty children participated in it.

sentences.arabic: فَازَتْ سَارَةُ بِالْمَرْكَزِ الأَوَّلِ فِي فِئَتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Sara je zauzela prvo mjesto u svojoj kategoriji.
sentences.translationEn: Sara won first place in her category.

sentences.arabic: حَصَلَ الْفَائِزُونَ عَلَى كُؤُوسٍ وَشَهَادَاتٍ تَقْدِيرِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Pobjednici su dobili pehare i pohvalnice.
sentences.translationEn: The winners received trophies and certificates of appreciation.
